reason: Types intentionally outside the normal WinMD-covered generation gate. Each entry is classified with an explicit reason category.

categories.native_interop: C++ interop header only, not in any WinMD. Must remain hand-written. True permanent.
categories.internal_abi: Custom internal ABI type, not a public WinMD type. True permanent.
categories.cross_module: Type exists in Windows.winmd (system WinMD), not in consumer-generated set. Generator can resolve as dependency but not target directly. Current-keep, not worth chasing now.

types.name: ISwapChainPanelNative
types.why: C++ interop header (microsoft.ui.xaml.hosting.h), not in WinMD

types.name: IWindowNative
types.why: C++ interop header, COM/native bridge for HWND access, not normal WinRT projection

types.name: ISwapChainPanelNative2
types.why: C++ interop header (microsoft.ui.xaml.media.dxinterop.h), not in WinMD. Extended native swap chain interface.

types.name: IApplicationAbi
types.why: Internal ABI for Application.Resources access, non-standard vtable, not a public WinMD type

types.name: IVector
types.why: Windows.Foundation.Collections.IVector<IInspectable> — generic type in Windows.winmd. Generator cannot emit generic instantiations. Movable when generator gains generic collection support.

types.name: IPropertyValue
types.why: Windows.Foundation.IPropertyValue — in Windows.winmd, not in consumer-generated set. Movable when generator supports targeting companion WinMD types directly.

types.name: IPropertyValueStatics
types.why: Windows.Foundation.IPropertyValueStatics — in Windows.winmd, not in consumer-generated set. Same limitation as IPropertyValue.

removed.name: IWindow2
removed.reason: IWindow2 exists in Xaml WinMD (Microsoft.UI.Xaml.IWindow2). Generator produces correct vtable with IID, all methods, and wrappers. Verified by SHAPE #122 exact shape probe.

removed.name: ITabView2
removed.reason: ITabView2 exists in Xaml WinMD (Microsoft.UI.Xaml.Controls.ITabView2). Generator produces correct vtable. Verified by SHAPE #122 exact shape probe.

removed.name: IFrameworkElement2
removed.reason: Consumer naming convention, not a WinMD type. ghostty-win migrated to canonical IFrameworkElement in Batch 3 (ghostty #59). No longer referenced in consumer code.

removed.name: IPanel2
removed.reason: Consumer naming convention, not a WinMD type. ghostty-win migrated to canonical IPanel in Batch 3 (ghostty #59). No longer referenced in consumer code.
